aboutIntro1: My primary expertise lies in Ethical Hacking and Penetration Testing. I am constantly analyzing digital infrastructures, uncovering vulnerabilities, and testing systems to build impenetrable defenses against modern cyber threats.
aboutIntro2: In parallel, I have strong, separate foundations in Web Development and IoT Engineering. I build scalable full-stack applications and program smart hardware devices. Looking forward, I am actively merging these fields to specialize in IoT Hacking and embedded hardware security.

projects.title: Deadpool Goes to College" – A Cinematic AI Vlog Experiment with Gemini Veo V3
projects.description: Proud to share my latest creative project that blends AI-generated video and storytelling. Using Gemini Veo V3, I brought the iconic character Deadpool into a college-themed vlog, filmed in the vibrant atmosphere of J.K.K. Nattraja Educational Institutions.

projects.title: AI-Powered Animal Alert System
projects.description: Using AI and real-time detection, this system identifies animal presence and instantly sends alerts via Telegram, helping prevent accidents and protect wildlife and people, especially in rural and forest-adjacent areas.

projects.title: Project Showcase: Smart Motion & Vibration Detection System
projects.description: This project demonstrates how simple sensors can be combined to create real-time monitoring and alert systems, useful in security, safety, and automation applications.

projects.title: Git and GitHub Crash Course
projects.description: A comprehensive crash course teaching version control with Git and GitHub. Topics cover repositories, commits, branching, and pushing to remote.

Validates practical hands-on experience using generative AI tools, refining prompt mechanics, and understanding key AI training frameworks to solve real-world problems responsibly
